text:
is a song from Evangelion: 3.0+1.0 Thrice Upon A Time. It is track 7 in the album Music from "Shin Evangelion": Evangelion: 3.0+1.0, disc 2. https://vgmdb.net/album/107287 

Lyrics

 
With your beauty you consume me always
With your voice your velvet tones they soothe me too
Suck me in and spit me out like candy
I can never work you out. you make me cry

Cos you turn and your face twisted in utter rage
Nothing needs to be said for you to lose your head
Can't believe that I cared, for someone who makes me scared
Now i need out for sure, I can't take anymore

With your beauty you consume me always
With your voice your velvet tonеs they soothe me too
Suck mе in and spit me out like candy
I can never work you out. you make me cry
